name: windows-paths
description: Windows-style path rejection per pack.md Section 2.3.2

tests.name: drive_letter_uppercase
tests.description: Uppercase drive letter MUST be rejected (R-345)

tests.name: drive_letter_lowercase
tests.description: Lowercase drive letter MUST be rejected (R-345)

tests.name: drive_letter_with_backslash
tests.description: Drive letter with backslashes MUST be rejected

tests.name: drive_letter_absolute
tests.description: Absolute path with drive letter MUST be rejected

tests.name: unc_double_slash
tests.description: UNC path with forward slashes MUST be rejected (R-346)

tests.name: unc_double_backslash
tests.description: UNC path with backslashes MUST be rejected (R-346)

tests.name: unc_extended_path
tests.description: Windows extended-length path MUST be rejected

tests.name: unc_device_path
tests.description: Windows device path MUST be rejected

tests.name: colon_not_drive_letter
tests.description: Colons in paths MUST be rejected (reserved on Windows)

tests.name: single_letter_segment_with_colon
tests.description: Colon after single letter looks like drive letter, MUST be rejected

tests.name: valid_path_no_windows_elements
tests.description: Standard forward-slash path without Windows elements is valid

tests.name: valid_path_with_numbers_and_colons_in_filename
tests.description: ISO timestamp with colons in filename MUST be rejected (colons not allowed)

tests.name: trailing_dot_rejected
tests.description: Trailing dot MUST be rejected (Windows strips trailing dots)

tests.name: trailing_space_rejected
tests.description: Trailing space MUST be rejected (Windows strips trailing spaces)

tests.name: trailing_dot_and_space_rejected
tests.description: Trailing dot and space MUST be rejected

tests.name: trailing_dot_in_subdirectory
tests.description: Trailing dot in directory segment MUST be rejected

tests.name: trailing_space_in_subdirectory
tests.description: Trailing space in directory segment MUST be rejected

tests.name: multiple_trailing_dots_rejected
tests.description: Multiple trailing dots MUST be rejected

tests.name: embedded_dot_allowed
tests.description: Embedded dots (not trailing) are allowed

tests.name: embedded_space_allowed
tests.description: Embedded spaces (not trailing) are allowed

notes: Per pack.md Section 2.3.2 and 2.3.5: Paths MUST NOT contain Windows drive letters (e.g., C:), MUST NOT be UNC paths (e.g., //server/share), colons are prohibited (reserved on Windows), and path segments MUST NOT end with trailing dots or spaces (Windows strips these, causing path collisions).
